label: Prismwater Terraces
description: Prismwater Terraces is a littoral city built across the stepped rim of an ancient impact basin, where Vitrasea’s shallow, glass-salted ocean meets terraced shelves of iridescent evaporite. Its streets follow polygon-fracture lines in the crust, forming angular wards linked by glazed causeways and low pressure-lock arcades suited to the planet’s thin alkaline air. Civic reservoirs and saltworks occupy the lower tiers, their vitrified weirs casting hard, colored reflections when the Saltglass System’s prismatic rings brighten the haze. After dark, magnetized crustal arcs drive steady auroral curtains over the basin, fixing the skyline in bands of pale green and opal light.
